# Pept — AI-Powered Peptide Research Assistant

> Ask any peptide question and get instant, evidence-based answers. Pept.me is the fastest way to research peptides — powered by an AI assistant trained on real studies and cited data.

Pept.me is built around an AI research assistant that answers questions about peptides instantly — mechanisms of action, research findings, safety considerations, supplier recommendations, and more. Users can create a free account to save conversations, bookmark peptides, and build a personalized research library. The AI assistant is the core experience at [pept.me](https://pept.me).

## Talk to the AI Assistant

[Ask anything about peptides](https://pept.me/assistant): The AI assistant provides conversational, research-backed answers about any peptide topic. It draws from evidence-based profiles, cited studies, and vetted supplier data to give accurate, up-to-date responses. No medical jargon — just clear, helpful answers.

- Ask about peptide mechanisms, research status, and potential applications
- Get supplier recommendations from vetted, tested sources
- Compare peptides, explore categories, and discover new research
- Available instantly — no sign-up required to start chatting

## Create a Free Account

[Sign up at pept.me](https://pept.me/auth/signup): Create an account to unlock the full experience.

- Save chat history and pick up conversations where you left off
- Bookmark peptides to build a personal research library
- Get notified about new peptide profiles and research updates

## Peptide Database

Pept also maintains a comprehensive peptide database with detailed, evidence-based profiles:

- [Browse All Peptides](https://pept.me/peptides): Searchable directory filterable by category, evidence level, and legal status
- [Categories](https://pept.me/categories): Antimicrobial Peptides, Growth Factors, Immune Modulation, Metabolic Peptides, Neuropeptides, Tissue Repair
- [Vetted Suppliers](https://pept.me/suppliers): Directory of tested and verified peptide suppliers

### Featured Peptides
- [Epitalon](https://pept.me/peptides/epitalon): Telomerase activation and melatonin modulation
- [Thymalin](https://pept.me/peptides/thymalin): Immune and anti-aging properties
- [CJC-1295](https://pept.me/peptides/cjc-1295): Growth hormone-releasing analogue
- [Ipamorelin](https://pept.me/peptides/ipamorelin): Growth hormone secretagogue
- [Melanotan II](https://pept.me/peptides/melanotan-ii): Skin pigmentation
- [Semax](https://pept.me/peptides/semax): Nootropic and neuroprotective peptide

This platform is intended for educational and research purposes only. Consult qualified healthcare professionals before any application of peptide information.
